DISCOVERY 302, ASSIGNEE GARY LOONEY'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST JUDGMENT DISCOVERY: THE MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT ROBERT E. GOWDY, JR. SHALL FURNISH RESPONSES TO (1) PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF POST JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES AND (2) PLAINTIFF'S POST JUDGMENT DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND THINGS, TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY OF RECORD WITHIN 30 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANT ROBERT E. GOWDY, JR. IS SANCTIONED IN THE AMOUNT OF $690.00, PAYABLE TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY OF RECORD WITHIN 30 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER. PREVAILING/MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING VIA EMAIL TO MAULAWSF@HOTMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery
Off Calendar Apr-15-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ASSIGNEE GARY LOONEY's Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery:

The Motion to Compel is Granted. Defendant Robert E. Gowdy, Jr. shall furnish responses to (1) Plaintiff's First Set of Post Judgment Interrogatories and (2) Plaintiff's Post Judgment Demand for Production of Documents and Things, to Plaintiff's attorney of record within 30 days of service of this Order. Defendant Robert E. Gowdy, Jr. is sanctioned in the amount of $690.00, payable to Plaintiff's attorney of record within 30 days of service of this Order.

Prevailing/Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling via email to maulawsf@hotmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Michael Mau, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
